description:
About this item
Unique Artistic Design: Showcasing a striking geometric silhouette, this modern elegant arched bookshelf has 5 irregular storage shelves with different heights and widths that provide a place for prized possessions of all sizes. Show off framed photos, potted plants, vases and artful decorations in statement-making style with this bookcase.
Premium Material: Our white display shelf is crafted with high-quality MDF, ensuring durability and long-lasting use. The premium veneer is waterproof, scratch-resistant, easy to clean and maintain. The sturdy construction offers strong support to withstand all your essentials, promising continued stability.
Sufficient Storage: With dimensions of 31.5" W x 12.52" D x 70.87" H, this tall bookcase offers plenty of storage room to organize and display your books, collectibles, and other items. With its 5 versatile different-sized compartments design, you can easily arrange all your daily items of different sizes or heights in this shelf.
Versatile Use: With its minimalist and delicate design, it's perfect for any room in your house, living room, bedroom, study room, closet or pantry etc. Whether you use it for display or storage, both are good choices. The free-standing vertical bookcase doesn’t take up too much floor space.
